column1: # Mount smoke-test matrix. Tab-separated: name  fixture  fs_flag  layout  subpath  expected
# layout: disk -> file under ro/ on Linux (overlay), tree root on Windows;
#         mem  -> ForensicFs tree at the root on both (sys/...).
# Every file-bearing format exposes hello.txt = "hello from <fmt>". Memory dumps
# have no embedded user file, so they assert sys/os-info.txt instead.
# Committed fixtures: exfat.img, hfsplus.img, apfs.img, ad1.ad1, aff4-logical.aff4. The rest are minted by
# gen-fixtures.sh. expected = a substring that must appear in the read file.
